tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Full Audit
tasks.detail: Runs all security checks: yarn audit, ESLint security rules, and secret scanning

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: yarn Vulnerability Audit
tasks.detail: Checks all yarn dependencies for known CVEs. Saves report to .security/

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Scan for Hardcoded Secrets
tasks.detail: Scans all files for accidentally committed secrets, API keys, passwords

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: ESLint Security Rules
tasks.command: yarn eslint src/ --config .eslintrc-security.js --format json | tee .security/eslint-security-$(date +%Y%m%d).json && yarn eslint src/ --config .eslintrc-security.js
tasks.detail: Runs ESLint with security-focused rules (no-eval, timing-safe, etc.)

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Check for Math.random() in Security Paths
tasks.command: grep -rn 'Math.random' src/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ Math.random found — replace with crypto.randomInt' || echo '✅ No Math.random in source'
tasks.detail: Finds unsafe Math.random() usage that should be crypto.randomInt()

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Check for customer_id in Request Body/Query
tasks.command: grep -rn 'req\.body\.customer_id\|req\.query\.customer_id\|req\.params\.customer_id' src/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ IDOR risk: customer_id from request — use auth_context.actor_id' || echo '✅ No IDOR patterns found'
tasks.detail: Detects IDOR vulnerability pattern: customer_id should never come from request

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Check for Unsafe Comparisons
tasks.command: grep -rn 'signature\s*===\|token\s*===\|secret\s*===\|hash\s*===' src/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ Timing-unsafe comparison found — use crypto.timingSafeEqual' || echo '✅ No unsafe comparisons found'
tasks.detail: Detects timing-unsafe secret comparisons (=== instead of timingSafeEqual)

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Check for console.log with Sensitive Data
tasks.command: grep -rn 'console\.log.*\(key\|secret\|token\|password\|otp\|hash\|salt\)' src/ --include='*.ts' -i && echo '❌ Sensitive data in logs' || echo '✅ No sensitive data logged'
tasks.detail: Finds console.log statements that might leak secrets

tasks.label: 🔴 Security: Check Webhook Fail-Closed
tasks.command: echo 'Checking webhook fail-closed patterns...' && grep -rn 'WEBHOOK_TOKEN\|WEBHOOK_SECRET\|RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK' src/api/hooks/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'if.*!' && echo '⚠️  Review webhook guard logic above' || echo '✅ Webhook guards appear fail-closed'
tasks.detail: Verifies webhooks reject requests when secrets are not configured

tasks.label: 🟡 Audit: TypeScript Strict Check
tasks.detail: TypeScript strict mode check — catches type errors that can hide security issues

tasks.label: 🟡 Audit: Check Paginated Queries for Missing Limits
tasks.command: grep -rn 'query\.graph\|findMany\|findAndCount' src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'take:' | grep -v '// no limit' && echo '⚠️  Queries without take: limit found — potential DoS vector' || echo '✅ All queries appear to have limits'
tasks.detail: Finds database queries that might be missing pagination limits

tasks.label: 🟡 Audit: Check External API Error Handling
tasks.command: grep -rn 'fetch\|axios\|got\|request' src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'try\|catch\|\.catch' | grep -v '//' && echo '⚠️  External API calls may lack error handling' || echo '✅ API calls appear to have error handling'
tasks.detail: Checks external API calls are wrapped in try/catch

tasks.label: 🟡 Audit: BUGS.md Summary
tasks.command: echo '=== BUGS.MD STATUS SUMMARY ===' && grep -E '^\| \*\*Status\*\*' BUGS.md | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
tasks.detail: Quick summary of bug status counts from BUGS.md

tasks.label: 🟡 Audit: Check Rate Limiting on Auth Routes
tasks.command: grep -rn 'emailpass\|reset-password\|update-password' src/api/ --include='*.ts' && echo '' && echo '--- Checking for rate limit middleware ---' && grep -rn 'rateLimit\|rate_limit\|rateLimiter' src/api/ --include='*.ts' || echo '⚠️  No rate limiting found on auth routes'
tasks.detail: Verifies auth endpoints have rate limiting applied

tasks.label: 🟢 Git: Pre-Push Safety Check
tasks.command: echo '=== PRE-PUSH CHECKS ===' && yarn build && echo '✅ Build OK' && yarn tsc --noEmit && echo '✅ TypeScript OK' && yarn audit --audit-level=high && echo '✅ yarn audit OK' && yarn eslint src/ --quiet && echo '✅ ESLint OK' && grep -rn 'Math.random' src/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ Math.random found' || echo '✅ No Math.random' && grep -rn 'req\.body\.customer_id' src/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ IDOR risk found' || echo '✅ No IDOR patterns'
tasks.detail: Run ALL checks before pushing to GitHub. Fix any failures before pushing.

tasks.label: 🟢 Git: Stage Security Fix
tasks.command: git add -p && echo 'Review staged changes above. When ready, run: Git: Commit Security Fix'
tasks.detail: Interactive staging for security fixes — review each chunk

tasks.label: 🟢 Git: Commit with Conventional Message
tasks.command: bash -c 'echo "Enter commit type (feat/fix/security/refactor/docs/test/chore): " && read type && echo "Enter scope (auth/cod/razorpay/shiprocket/orders/etc): " && read scope && echo "Enter description: " && read desc && echo "Enter bug ID (BUG-XXX or skip): " && read bugid && git commit -m "${type}(${scope}): ${desc}" -m "Fixes: ${bugid}"'

tasks.label: 🟢 Git: Update BUGS.md After Fix
tasks.command: bash -c 'echo "Enter BUG ID (e.g. BUG-001): " && read bugid && COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) && DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && sed -i "s/\| \*\*Status\*\* \| 🔴 OPEN \|/| **Status** | 🟢 FIXED |/" BUGS.md && echo "Updated ${bugid} to FIXED. Remember to manually add commit hash: ${COMMIT} and date: ${DATE} to the entry."'
tasks.detail: Marks a bug as FIXED in BUGS.md with current commit hash

tasks.label: 🚀 Full Security Sweep (All Checks)
dependsOn: 🔴 Security: Check for Math.random() in Security Paths
🔴 Security: Check for customer_id in Request Body/Query
🟡 Audit: Check Paginated Queries for Missing Limits
tasks.detail: Runs the complete security test suite in sequence
